description:
Manage Your Linode Cloud with NexNode A powerful native Android app to control your Linode instances, domains, support tickets and more...

Features

- Multiple accounts - Create a domain - Import a domain - Add a domain record - Edit a record - Add a payment method - Create a support ticket - Reply to a support ticket - Stop a server - Change a server's root password - Enable server rescue mode - Delete a server - Enable server backups and create snapshots - Dashboard (quick overview) - Create an instance - Update account token - View all instances - View events - View profile - Reboot a server - Delete a domain record - View support tickets (open and closed) and their replies - View domains - View domain records - View payment methods - View payments - View invoices - View volumes - View Linode plans - View regions - View NodeBalancers

Complete list of features: https://codeberg.org/swatian/NexNode/wiki/Features

Source code: https://codeberg.org/swatian/NexNode

Developer: https://mastodon.social/@mmarif
